narrative:
Precinct Big Spring Township (precinct in Seneca County) has 948 registered voters, with 47.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 44.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 36.7 percentage points.
